avoid_when: The frozen DINOv2 representation already reaches the target metric or GPU memory is insufficient.

evidence.note: The official DINOv2 model card permits downstream fine-tuning when the frozen representation is insufficient.

risk: A high backbone learning rate can destroy pretrained features on a small dataset.
summary: Unfreeze only the final two DINOv2 encoder blocks for fine-grained dog breed adaptation while retaining most pretrained features.
use_when: A frozen linear probe underfits visually similar dog breeds.
